summary: Overall health YELLOW. Main branch CI is green (PR #1147 merged 2026-03-27T23:09Z). Three cross-repo PRs require action: cloud#472 is all-green and ready for human merge (workspace#97 final item); analytics#31 has two LGTM reviews and should merge (analytics#29 should close as superseded). Studio EM report PR #1150 has merge conflicts and needs rebase. P1 dogfood cluster: 8 open governance denial/false-positive issues pointing at two root causes in the command scanner (#1139 — $(date) false positive, #1119 — destructive detection scanning heredoc content). Swarm hygiene: 149 orphaned branches (#1127) and 11 stale worktrees (#1128) awaiting ops cleanup. Risk score 41/100 HIGH (#1124/#1125) primarily driven by branch accumulation.

issuesTriaged.title: [dogfood] Safe date command substitution blocked as dangerous shell expansion
issuesTriaged.rootCause: Command scanner pattern-matches $(date ...) as 'nested command substitution'. Read-only date calls should be whitelisted.
issuesTriaged.action: assign to kernel-sr for command-scanner false-positive sprint

issuesTriaged.title: [dogfood] Destructive detection fires on report content mentioning blocked patterns
issuesTriaged.rootCause: Destructive command matcher scans full shell command string including heredoc content and inline Python literals. Should only scan the invoked command, not its string arguments/content.
issuesTriaged.action: assign to kernel-sr for command-scanner false-positive sprint

issuesTriaged.title: Governance runtime fails to start in worktrees — better-sqlite3 bindings missing
issuesTriaged.status: partially mitigated — --no-sqlite flag from #1147 provides workaround. Root cause (stale npx cache / NODE_MODULE_VERSION mismatch from #1144) still open.
issuesTriaged.action: track for docs update and deeper native bindings investigation

issuesTriaged.title: security_reminder_hook blocks Write on GH Actions workflows instead of warning
issuesTriaged.rootCause: security_reminder_hook.py exits with error code on first Write to .github/workflows/*.yml; identical retry succeeds. Hook should warn (exit 0), not block (exit non-zero).
issuesTriaged.action: investigate hook exit code; fix to warn-only

issuesTriaged.title: Swarm Health Alert — 78% agent worktrees stuck or dead
issuesTriaged.status: Root cause resolved by #1147 (--no-sqlite). 11 stale worktrees at base commit ae37b15 need physical cleanup.
issuesTriaged.action: ops: git worktree prune, dead PID cleanup, swarm-state.json refresh

dogfoodReport.denialPatternNote: 8 open dogfood denial issues. Bulk appear to be pr-merger and cloud agents hitting governance rules. Most may be legitimately blocked (force-push, main-push protections). Kernel Squad's false-positive sprint (#1139, #1119) should reduce noise from legitimate reports.

backlogHygiene.pruneRecommendation: 149 orphaned branches (no open PR, >7 days stale) — stale-branch-janitor confirmed none have active PRs. OPS should bulk-delete to reduce noise.
backlogHygiene.reportIssuesBacklog: Issues #1106, #1110, #1116, #1124, #1125, #1128, #1149 are informational reports that can be closed once actioned to reduce issue count.
